languages.text: Зарков так и остался захолустьем протектората династии фон Валанциус, раздираемым между традициями и новыми возможностями, так никогда и не обретшим способность балансировать между двумя крайностями.
Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.
languages.original_text: Зарков так и остался захолустьем протектората династии фон Валанциус, раздираемым между традициями и новыми возможностями, так никогда и не обретшим способность балансировать между двумя крайностями.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.
Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.
Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.

languages.text: ザルコフはフォン・ヴァランシウスの保護領の辺境地帯にあり、伝統と新しい可能性の間で揺れ動き、両極端のバランスを見つけることができなかった。
languages.original_text: Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフはフォン・ヴァランシウスの保護領の辺境地帯にあり、伝統と新しい可能性の間で揺れ動き、両極端のバランスを見つけることができなかった。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫仍然是冯·瓦兰修斯治下的一个偏僻地方。它在传统与新机遇之间摇摆不定，却始终未能在两个极端之间找到平衡。
languages.original_text: Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫仍然是冯·瓦兰修斯治下的一个偏僻地方。它在传统与新机遇之间摇摆不定，却始终未能在两个极端之间找到平衡。

languages.text: Zarkov demeura un monde arriéré du protectorat von Valancius. Partagé entre tradition et nouvelles possibilités, il ne parvint jamais vraiment à trouver un équilibre entre ces deux extrêmes.
languages.original_text: Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov demeura un monde arriéré du protectorat von Valancius. Partagé entre tradition et nouvelles possibilités, il ne parvint jamais vraiment à trouver un équilibre entre ces deux extrêmes.

languages.text: Zarkov no dejó de ser un mundo remoto e irrelevante del protectorado von Valancius, atrapado entre la tradición y las nuevas posibilidades sin encontrar nunca un equilibrio entre ambos extremos.
languages.original_text: Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov no dejó de ser un mundo remoto e irrelevante del protectorado von Valancius, atrapado entre la tradición y las nuevas posibilidades sin encontrar nunca un equilibrio entre ambos extremos.

languages.text: Zarkov; gelenek ile yeni olasılıklar arasında bölünmüş, iki uç nokta arasında asla tam bir denge bulamamış hâlde von Valancius protektorasının ücra bir köşesi olarak kaldı.
languages.original_text: Zarkov remained a backwater of the von Valancius protectorate, torn between tradition and new possibilities, never quite able to find a balance between the two extremes.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov; gelenek ile yeni olasılıklar arasında bölünmüş, iki uç nokta arasında asla tam bir denge bulamamış hâlde von Valancius protektorasının ücra bir köşesi olarak kaldı.

languages.text: Zarkov blieb ein von Traditionen und neuen Möglichkeiten zerrissenes Sorgenkind des Protektorats derer von Valancius, das nie eine wirkliche Balance zwischen beiden Extremen fand.
